meta.title: KotikGo — AI Travel Assistant
meta.description: Plan your trip in one message. AI finds flights, transfers, hotels and tells you everything about the country.

hero.desc: Tell us where you're going. KotikGo will find flights, transfers, hotels, insurance and tell you everything about the country.

services.flights_desc: Comparing hundreds of airlines. AI shows the best option.
services.transfers_desc: Airport to hotel in any country. Fixed price.
services.hotels_desc: Hotels and villas. We compare Booking, Agoda and find cheaper.
services.esim_desc: Internet in any country. We'll pick a plan for your trip.
services.insurance_desc: Matched to your activities and country. Done in a minute.

cta.title: Where to next?
cta.desc: Flights, transfers, hotels, insurance — AI plans it all in a minute. Free.

chat.greeting: Hi! Tell me where and when you're planning to go, or just ask anything
chat.disclaimer: KotikGo AI can make mistakes. Verify important information.
